## Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Problem It Solves
What problem or limitation does this address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed solution or feature.

## Alternative Solutions
Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Use Cases
How would users benefit from this feature?

## Additional Context
Any other context, examples, or references.

## Example
If applicable, provide an example of how this would work:
```python
# Example code here
```
